name: Shadow Fiend
description: So, you're curious where I come from? There's one easy way to find out for yourself. Nevermore, the Shadow Fiend

abilities.name: Necromastery
abilities.description: Grants bonus attack damage per stack from unit kills, and loses a portion of stacks upon death. Harvested souls swirl in and out of the Abysm, empowering the Shadow Fiend to increase the size of his collection.

abilities.name: Shadowraze
abilities.description: Shadow Fiend razes the ground a short distance away from him, dealing damage to enemy units in the area. Shadow Fiend razes the ground a longer distance away from him, dealing damage to enemy units in the area.

abilities.name: Feast of Souls
abilities.description: Grants self bonus attack speed for an amount of time. The frenzy state increases the Necromastery stack limit but consumes some at the end of the process.

abilities.name: Presence of the Dark Lord
abilities.description: The presence itself reduces the armor of enemy units within the radius.

abilities.name: Requiem of Souls
abilities.description: Creates a damaging line projectile per Necromastery stack.
